name: Sweet Potato Soup (Microwave)
recipeIngredient: ¼ pound low fat ricotta cheese
¼ teaspoon freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce the potatoes with a fork on top and bottom.
2. Place them on a paper towel at least 1 inch apart in the microwave oven and cook on HIGH for 8 to 10 minutes, or until tender. Let stand 5 minutes.
3. Peel the potatoes and cut each into eight pieces.
4. Place the pieces in the bowl of the food processor and pulse on and off six to eight times, until pureed.
5. Combine the pureed potato with the remaining ingredients in a 2 quart microwaveable casserole.
6. Stir until the mixture is smooth.
7. Microwave on HIGH for 6 to 8 minutes, or until heated through.
8. Serve with tasty bread.
